pvs.author: descentsubs @Vocaloid
pvs.description:
"Some sparkling electropop. If you can just feel that electric love..."

If we are gonna bring back all the good HachioujiP/8#Prince songs, let's start from the beautiful piece that started it all. I hope you enjoy this translation of Electric Love. This is the feature song of his album "Electric Love" and I can't recommend it enough! (http://vocaloid.wikia.com/wiki/Electric_love_-_Album)

Original Upload: http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm9097377

□Music・Lyrics・Video: 八王子P (Hachioji-P) [mylist/16586786 | co276689 | twitter : 8_Prince]
□Illustrations : 有坂あこ (Arisaka Ako) [mylist/16375067]
□Karaoke [http://goo.gl/fhA4V]
